taxonomy: Demorchis flexistyla is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Demorchis is a small group of orchids, and Demorchis flexistyla is the only known species within this genus. This orchid is native to the tropical regions of Asia. Further classification may also include the subfamily Orchidoideae.
